title: Age Calculator - Exact Age in Years, Months, Days - Free Online
error: Please select a valid date of birth
seoDesc: Free online age calculator: calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Enter your date of birth to find out how old you are, total days lived, day of the week you were born, and days until your next birthday. Accurate age calculation.
seoHowToDesc: To calculate age, subtract the birth date from the current date. The age is expressed in years, months, and days. For example, someone born on March 15, 1990 is 36 years, 1 month, and 26 days old as of today. Our age calculator handles leap years and month length differences automatically.
